validated_commands.build_note: Full workspace build requires goose git dep (network blocked in CI); persistence crate builds/tests independently

open_prs.title: [Perf Improver] SQLite PRAGMA tuning: ~12x write throughput improvement in WAL mode

optimization_backlog.title: Store SessionStore in Engine/SessionManager instead of creating per call
optimization_backlog.notes: SessionStore::new() is just an Arc clone - very cheap. Not a real bottleneck.

optimization_backlog.title: Batch message persistence into transactions
optimization_backlog.notes: Currently each message is a separate transaction. Could batch user+assistant messages in a single transaction per conversation turn.

optimization_backlog.title: Add formal criterion benchmarks to persistence crate
optimization_backlog.notes: No benchmarks exist. Adding criterion benchmarks would allow regression detection.

optimization_backlog.title: Cache recent session history in memory
optimization_backlog.notes: load_history() hits SQLite on every Goose agent invocation. An LRU cache per session would avoid repeated reads.

perf_notes: Full workspace build downloads goose from GitHub (network blocked). Use -p opengoose-persistence for local work.
SQLite synchronous=NORMAL in WAL mode is safe and ~12x faster for per-commit writes.
libsqlite3-sys with bundled feature - SQLite version is bundled, no system SQLite dependency.
